zh.Stansfield, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾史坦菲爾德
zh.Stansfield, West Yorkshire, England, Uni: 英國英格蘭越可爾史坦菲爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Saville於大約1405年出生在英國越可爾恩爾時，她的父親John Savile IV17歲，母親Maud de Trafford20歲。她於1423年與Thomas de Stansfeld在英國越可爾史坦菲爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1451年12月17日在英國素福爾可享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Saville于大约1405年出生在英国越可爾恩爾时，她的父亲John Savile IV17岁，母亲Maud de Trafford20岁。她于1423年与Thomas de Stansfeld在英国越可爾史坦菲爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1451年12月17日在英国素福爾可享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin; Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in northern France of which the identity is not clear, though it is probably Sainville in Eure-et-Loire, so called from Old French saisne ‘Saxon’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Savel , Savell , and Savelle .

variants.name: Savel
meanings: Slovak and Czech (Šavel): from the Biblical personal name Šavel, Hebrew Shaul (see Saul ). It may be a nickname for a godless person, from the archaic word šavel, which is derived from the Biblical name.

Slovenian (Šavel): probably from an old spelling of the Biblical personal name Savel (see Saul , compare 2 above). Alternatively, perhaps a nickname or a topographic name from an old vernacular spelling of the same plant name as in 4 below.
Americanized form of Slovenian Šavelj: probably a nickname or a topographic name from the plant name š(č)avelj ‘sorrel (Rumex acetosa)’.

variants.name: Savelle
meanings: English: variant of   Saville  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Saffell
meanings: English (Essex): from the Middle English personal name Safugel (Old Norse sǽfogl ‘sea-bird, especially the cormorant’), not recorded as a personal name in Scandinavia, but common in England after the Norman Conquest. In some cases with voicing of intervocalic /f/ to /v/, there may have been confusion with Saville .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Saville was born about 1405, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, her father, John Savile IV, was 17 and her mother, Maud de Trafford, was 20. She married Thomas de Stansfeld in 1423, in Stansfield, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 17 December 1451, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Saville est née environ 1405, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Savile IV, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Maud de Trafford, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Stansfeld en 1423, à Stansfield, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 décembre 1451, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Saville um 1405 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Savile IV 17 und ihre Mutter Maud de Trafford 20. Sie hat 1423 in Stansfield, Yorkshire, England Thomas de Stansfeld geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Dezember 1451 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Saville è nata il circa 1405 nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John Savile IV, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Maud de Trafford, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Stansfeld nel 1423, nel Stansfield, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 17 dicembre 1451, nel Suffolk, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Savilleが約1405年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで生まれた時，父John Savile IVは17歳，母Maud de Traffordは20歳であった。1423年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスタンスフィールドでThomas de Stansfeldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1451年12月17日にイギリススフォルクで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Saville(이)가 대략 1405년 영국 요르크실르 토른힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Savile IV(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Trafford(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1423년 영국 요르크실르 스탠스필드에서 Thomas de Stansfeld(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1451년 12월 17일 영국 수폴크에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Stansfield, West Yorkshire, England, Uni: Stansfield, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Saville nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Savile IV, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Trafford, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Stansfeld em 1423, em Stansfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de dezembro de 1451, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Saville родилась около 1405 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Savile IV было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Trafford, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Stansfeld в 1423 г. в местности стансфиелд, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 17 декабря 1451 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Saville nació aproximadamente 1405, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Savile IV, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Maud de Trafford, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Thomas de Stansfeld en 1423, en Stansfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 17 de diciembre de 1451, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
